name: ItemExpression.From
description: Returns the abstract syntax tree (AST) for the body of `function`, normalized into an *item expression*: * The function must be a 1-argument lambda. * All references to the function parameter are replaced with [`ItemExpression.Item`](itemexpression-item.md). * The AST will be simplified to contain only nodes of the kinds: * `Constant` * `Invocation` * `Unary` * `Binary` * `If` * `FieldAccess` An error is raised if an item expression AST cannot be returned for the body of `function`. This function is identical to [`RowExpression.From`](rowexpression-from.md).
